actions.text: (-white)This sector has an abundance of geysers making it perfect for Steel production.

Research the [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/MineralExtractor.png]Mineral Extractor and place it on a geyser to extract [res://textures/resources/iron.png]Iron.
You will need to power it.
(-white)Now research and place a [res://textures/blocks/factories/SteelFurnace.png]Steel Furnace and give it Iron to produce [res://textures/resources/steel.png]Steel.

[res://textures/blocks/units/Unit Refabricator/UnitRefabricatorComplete.png]Unit Refabricators take tier 1 units, copper, silicon, steel, and power and output tier 2 units.
Place a Tank Fabricator facing into a Unit Reconstructor, supply the required resources, and make a Breach.

You will need to resarch the [res://textures/blocks/turrets/DoubleBarrel/DoubleBarrelComplete.png]Double Barrel and [res://textures/blocks/walls/LargeSteelWall.png]Large Steel Wall then build a defense with them to better attack the enemy's stronger units. 
Make sure to supply the Double Barrels with ammo.

Research and place the upgraded version of the Mechanical Drill, the [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/PlasmaBore.png]Plasma Bore to extract resources quicker.
Additionally, use the upgraded version of the Conveyor Belt, the [res://textures/blocks/item transportation/Duct/Duct.png]Duct to transmit items faster.
(-white)Now command your units and destroy the enemy core.
